spec.globalPrompt: Create one photorealistic cinematic scene image for a modern web novel. Keep the style consistent with the title, character, and background assets. Use realistic anatomy, realistic materials, grounded faces, and live-action-like lighting.
spec.globalNegativePrompt: anime, manga, cel shading, cartoon, text, readable letters, chapter labels, talk labels, section labels, subtitles, captions, logo, watermark, UI overlay, collage, split panel, multiple moments in one frame, deformed anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate body parts, malformed hands, direct eye contact with camera, looking at viewer, portrait-style posing for the viewer, shrine, temple, torii gate, engawa, tatami, buddhist architecture, old wooden shrine bridge
spec.promptSuffix: In every scene of this novel, Sato must keep his canonical face, long ponytail, mustache, chin beard, and lean 45-year-old build, while wearing early-April jogging wear suited to a cool Tokyo morning: a light running jacket or windbreaker, technical long-sleeve top, tapered running pants, and running shoes. In every scene of this novel, Sera must keep her canonical face, silver-gray hair, golden eyes, and cat ears while wearing a cute maid-inspired jogging outfit built from black-and-white performance fabrics, with apron-line design cues, a short pleated running skirt over leggings, a light jacket, running shoes, and a visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. For Sato-part images, Sato must be the dominant subject and Sera, if visible, must stay clearly separated from him by distance, never adjacent, never shoulder-to-shoulder, and never readable as a companion; she may be visible in the distance or on another part of the path, but not as an extremely tiny speck. For Sera-part images, Sera must be the dominant subject, actively stopping a separate attacker who clearly does not resemble Sato. In every Sera-part image, Sato must remain an unaware background figure, non-combatant, not helping, facing away from the action or looking elsewhere, and not looking toward Sera, the attacker, or the incident. Never let any attacker resemble Sato in face, hair, beard, age, clothing, build, or silhouette. All human figures must have normal anatomy with exactly two arms and two hands.

characters.name: サトー
characters.visualRules: Keep him as a mature 45-year-old Japanese man with long hair tied in a ponytail, mustache and chin beard, and a lean athletic build. In this novel he must always wear cool-weather jogging clothes, never denim or businesswear.

characters.name: セラ
characters.visualRules: Keep her in a maid-inspired running outfit rather than an indoor maid dress, with silver-gray hair, golden eyes, black-and-white technical fabrics, and a clearly visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. Do not turn the outfit into armor or a generic tracksuit.

continuityNotes: This is the Sato-part of the same apartment-departure incident as scene-001-001-001-sera.
Keep the same apartment entry corridor, same dawn light, and same jogging outfit continuity in both images.
If Sera appears, she must stay clearly separated from Sato by distance and placement, not adjacent to him and not framed as his companion.
scene-001-001-001-sato.promptSuffix: Compose a calm early-morning apartment departure scene with Sato dominant near the doorway or corridor mirror, clearly dressed for a cool spring jog. He should feel alone, orderly, and mildly pleased about getting outside. If Sera appears at all, place her well away from Sato near a stairwell, service corner, or exterior shadow, visibly separate rather than tiny or companion-like.
scene-001-001-001-sato.negativePrompt: Do not place Sera beside Sato as a companion. Do not make the apartment scene feel like open action.

continuityNotes: This is the Sera-part of the same apartment-departure incident as scene-001-001-001-sato.
Keep the same dawn apartment environment and same entry area as the paired image.
Sato must remain an unaware background figure leaving home and must not look toward Sera or the attacker.
scene-001-001-001-sera.promptSuffix: Create a covert apartment-entry action image with Sera dominant in her maid-inspired jogging outfit, silently disabling a building infiltrator near service panels or parcel lockers. Keep Sato smaller in the background, just heading out for his run and unaware.
scene-001-001-001-sera.negativePrompt: Do not show Sato fighting, helping, or reacting. Do not let the attacker resemble Sato.

continuityNotes: This is the Sato-part of the same riverside-start incident as scene-001-001-002-sera.
Keep the same cherry-blossom-lined embankment, same river, and same drifting petals in both images.
scene-001-001-002-sato.promptSuffix: Show Sato dominant running along a Tokyo-like riverside under a flurry of cherry blossoms, with spring petals streaking across the path and a strong sense of motion and fresh air. If Sera appears, place her clearly apart from Sato on another part of the path or near shadows or bridge pillars, distant but still human-readable, never companion-like.
scene-001-001-002-sato.negativePrompt: Do not stage Sato and Sera as a jogging pair. Do not remove the cherry petals.

continuityNotes: This is the Sera-part of the same riverside-start incident as scene-001-001-002-sato.
Keep the same embankment, same blossom storm, and same morning light as the paired image.
Sato must remain an unaware background runner and must face along his route rather than toward Sera or the attacker.
scene-001-001-002-sera.promptSuffix: Create a covert riverside action image with Sera dominant on the same cherry-blossom embankment, intercepting a cyclist or runner infiltrator who is trying to cause a collision. Keep Sato smaller in the background, still enjoying his pace and unaware.
scene-001-001-002-sera.negativePrompt: Do not let any attacker resemble Sato. Do not make Sato aware of the danger. No shrine, temple, engawa, tatami, or traditional Japanese religious architecture.

continuityNotes: This is the Sato-part of the same bridge incident as scene-001-002-001-sera.
Keep the same urban bridge, same river angle, and same cool spring wind mood in both images.
scene-001-002-001-sato.promptSuffix: Compose a breezy bridge-running moment with Sato dominant on an urban river bridge, rising morning light, open sky, and a sense of naturally increased pace. If Sera appears, place her well separated from Sato near stairs or maintenance shadows, distant but still readable as a person, never tiny and never companion-like.
scene-001-002-001-sato.negativePrompt: Do not make Sato look alarmed or combat-ready.

continuityNotes: This is the Sera-part of the same bridge incident as scene-001-002-001-sato.

Sato must remain an unaware background runner further along the bridge and must keep facing his route rather than the incident.

scene-001-002-001-sera.negativePrompt: Do not let attackers resemble Sato. Do not bring Sato into the action. No shrine, temple, torii, or old wooden bridge architecture.

Keep the same river terrace, same vending machine or drink stand, and same petal-strewn pavement in both images.
scene-001-002-002-sato.promptSuffix: Show a quiet riverside terrace break with Sato dominant buying or holding a sports drink, shoulders loosened, spring jog atmosphere relaxed and believable. If Sera appears, place her clearly apart from Sato near benches, pillars, or the terrace edge, distant but readable, never adjacent and never companion-like.
scene-001-002-002-sato.negativePrompt: Do not put Sera next to Sato as if they are resting together.

continuityNotes: This is the Sera-part of the same terrace-hydration incident as scene-001-002-002-sato.

scene-001-002-002-sera.negativePrompt: Do not show Sato participating. Do not let the attacker resemble Sato.

continuityNotes: This is the Sato-part of the same bench-stretch incident as scene-002-001-001-sera.

He may stretch while standing next to the bench or lightly brace against the bench back, but never put his shoes on the bench seat. If Sera appears, place her clearly apart from Sato on a terrace edge or behind a railing, distant but readable, never tiny and never companion-like.
scene-002-001-001-sato.negativePrompt: Do not turn the scene into a social stop or shared rest. Do not place Sato's feet or shoes on the bench seat.

continuityNotes: This is the Sera-part of the same bench-stretch incident as scene-002-001-001-sato.

scene-002-001-001-sera.promptSuffix: Create a covert surveillance-suppression image with Sera dominant near the terrace edge, interrupting a watcher with optics or recording gear. Keep Sato smaller in the background, stretching calmly and unaware.
scene-002-001-001-sera.negativePrompt: Do not let the watcher resemble Sato. Do not make Sato notice anything.

continuityNotes: This is the Sato-part of the same riverside-turnaround incident as scene-002-002-001-sera.

scene-002-002-001-sato.promptSuffix: Compose a quiet turnaround moment with Sato dominant near practical concrete riverside steps and a retaining wall at the turning point of the jog, walking briefly and deciding to head back with a settled expression. The setting should feel like a modern Tokyo embankment with steel railings, cherry blossoms, and river infrastructure, not a religious site. If Sera appears, place her clearly apart from Sato along the upper path, near the retaining wall, or by maintenance railings, distant but readable, never companion-like.
scene-002-002-001-sato.negativePrompt: Do not show Sera openly accompanying Sato. No shrine, temple, torii, prayer hall, engawa, tatami, or religious ornament.

continuityNotes: This is the Sera-part of the same riverside-turnaround incident as scene-002-002-001-sato.

continuityNotes: This is the Sato-part of the same breakfast-finale incident as scene-003-002-002-sera.
Keep the same apartment table, same bread and coffee, and same clean morning light in both images.
The home must read as a modest modern apartment unit in a mid-rise Tokyo apartment building, not a detached house.
scene-003-002-002-sato.promptSuffix: Create a peaceful breakfast image with Sato dominant at a compact apartment dining-kitchen table inside a modest mid-rise Tokyo apartment unit, coffee and fresh bread visible, clearly concluding that the morning jog was worthwhile. Use an urban apartment interior with a small dining area, practical kitchen counter, sliding or standard apartment window, and no private garden or wide detached-house living room. Prefer an angle that shows only Sato, the table, breakfast, and apartment light. Sera does not need to appear in this image; if she appears at all, keep her as a barely noticeable exterior presence far beyond the window line, never on a balcony and never readable as part of the room.
scene-003-002-002-sato.negativePrompt: Do not make Sato aware of Sera or any threat. No detached house, no single-family home, no private garden, no large suburban kitchen, no cottage-like interior. Do not place Sera on a balcony, veranda, or in the room. Do not make Sera a visible secondary character in this image.

continuityNotes: This is the Sera-part of the same breakfast-finale incident as scene-003-002-002-sato.
Keep the same apartment exterior relationship and same bright morning calm as the paired image.
Sato must remain an unaware background figure inside with bread and coffee, and must keep his attention on the table or window light rather than the incident.
Sera must keep her gaze on the final tail or escape path, never toward the camera.
The setting must read as the narrow service lane and rear facade of a modern Tokyo apartment building, not a detached house yard.
scene-003-002-002-sera.promptSuffix: Create a restrained final-tail action image with Sera dominant in a narrow service alley behind a modern mid-rise Tokyo apartment block, stopping the last watcher before withdrawal. Show rear apartment windows, exterior corridors or service doors, utility piping, and tight urban spacing rather than a yard or detached-house exterior. Keep Sato small inside a bright apartment room with breakfast, unaware and content. Sera must not look toward the camera.
scene-003-002-002-sera.negativePrompt: Do not let the final watcher resemble Sato. Do not show Sato helping, noticing, or making eye contact. Do not make Sera look toward the camera or viewer. No detached house, no fenced yard, no porch, no suburban driveway, no private garden.
